name: James Cameron's Story of Science Fiction
original_name: James Cameron's Story of Science Fiction
overview: Explore the evolution of sci-fi from its origins as a small genre with a cult following to the blockbuster pop-cultural phenomenon we know today. In each episode, James Cameron introduces one of the “Big Questions” that humankind has contemplated throughout the ages and reaches back into sci-fi’s past to better understand how our favorite films, TV shows, books, and video games were born.

trailers.title: James Cameron's Story of Science Fiction: 'Big Questions' Official Teaser
